action_recommendations.HOLD_POSITION: Maintain current assessment. No structural changes detected that alter thesis viability.
action_recommendations.INCREASE_MONITORING: Elevated signals detected. Increase monitoring frequency. Watch for compound stress indicators crossing elevated thresholds.
action_recommendations.REDUCE_EXPOSURE: Material structural stress detected. Recommend reducing position sizing or hedging. One or more kill switches approaching WARNING status.
action_recommendations.EXIT_SIGNAL: Fundamental thesis falsification detected. One or more kill switches TRIGGERED. Architecture is failing or has failed.

scoring_terminology.scale_description: 0-100 scale measuring structural stress on the Atlas Fixed-Rate Architecture thesis
scoring_terminology.low_range: 0-25: Thesis operating normally. Minor deviations within expected parameters.
scoring_terminology.medium_range: 26-50: Elevated structural concern. One or more indicators in warning range.
scoring_terminology.high_range: 51-75: Significant structural stress. Multiple compounding indicators. Kill switches under pressure.
scoring_terminology.critical_range: 76-100: Thesis under severe threat or actively falsifying. Architecture demonstrating failure mode.
